name: googlews
description: Google Workspace CLI integration for supercli

commands.name: drive
commands.description: Google Drive management - upload, download, share files and folders

commands.name: gmail
commands.description: Gmail operations - send emails, manage labels, search messages

commands.name: calendar
commands.description: Google Calendar - manage events, list calendars, set availability

commands.name: sheets
commands.description: Google Sheets - read, write, and manage spreadsheets

commands.name: docs
commands.description: Google Docs - create and manage documents

commands.name: chat
commands.description: Google Chat - send messages and manage spaces

commands.name: admin
commands.description: Google Workspace Admin - manage users, groups, and domain settings
